endpoints.summary: Create document. Idempotent — if a document with the same name already exists in the collection, the existing document is returned with already_existed=true.

Links two articles. source_id and target_id must be different articles. Self-linking is not allowed and will return a circular_link error. If already linked, returns already_linked=true without error.

Update article. The patch parameter accepts a JSON object with fields to update. Strings are parsed as JSON or wrapped as content. Lists are wrapped as items. Valid patch properties: title (string), name (string, alias for title), body (string), tags (array of strings), category_id (string), status (string), author (string).

Update record. The patch must be a JSON object containing a "fields" key whose value is an object mapping field names to new values. All field values are accepted as strings, numbers, or booleans and will be coerced to the field's declared type. For text fields, numeric values like 50000 are automatically converted to their string representation. Example: {"fields": {"Contract Value": "50000", "Status": "Active"}}
Activate automation. Automation must have a trigger with a type set via update (patch.trigger.type) before activation. Create automation first, update it with trigger configuration, then activate.

Pause a running or scheduled campaign. Only campaigns in scheduled or sending status can be paused. Campaigns that are already sent, draft, or paused cannot be paused. To pause a campaign, first schedule it (schedule_campaign) or send it (send_campaign) so it enters scheduled or sending status. State flow: scheduled/sending -> paused. A paused campaign can later be resumed by calling send_campaign.
Schedule campaign. Campaign must have a subject set via update_campaign (patch.subject) before scheduling. Create campaign first, then update it with subject, then schedule.

Send campaign. Campaign status must be draft, scheduled, or paused to send. Campaigns in sent or sending status cannot be re-sent. The campaign must have a body or html_body. You can either set them beforehand via update_campaign (patch.body or patch.html_body), OR pass body/html_body directly in this call. State flow: draft/scheduled/paused -> sending -> sent.

Move a clip to a new position or track. Time values accept seconds (float) or timecode strings in HH:MM:SS.mmm format. The clip_id must reference an existing clip obtained from add_to_timeline or get_timeline.
